brave-search.description: Provides web search capabilities using Brave Search API
notes: Requires a Brave Search API key (get one at https://brave.com/search/api/)
Set BRAVE_API_KEY environment variable with your API key
Never commit your API key to version control
Free tier available with rate limits
Alternative: Use Google Custom Search or other search APIs

google-search.description: Provides web search using Google Custom Search API
notes: Requires Google API key and Custom Search Engine ID
Set both GOOGLE_API_KEY and GOOGLE_CSE_ID environment variables
